control_objective: Ensure the AWS root user is protected with multi-factor authentication
Ensure the AWS root user does not have active access keys
Ensure IAM users are protected with MFA
Identify IAM users with no recent activity to support access review and leaver validation
Identify active IAM access keys that have not been used within the defined threshold
Identify IAM users with administrative or overly permissive access
test_method: boto3 iam.list_users iam.list_attached_user_policies iam.list_user_policies and iam.get_policy_version

control_objective: Ensure account activity is logged for audit and investigation
Ensure S3 buckets are not publicly exposed
test_method: boto3 s3control and s3 public access block checks

control_objective: Ensure S3 buckets encrypt objects at rest
Ensure threat detection is enabled in AWS accounts
Ensure centralized security posture management is enabled
